meta.project: Integrated Community Service Management System (KKN UIN SAIZU)

product_overview: A centralized platform to digitize the end-to-end KKN lifecycle at UIN SAIZU — from eligibility checks and student registration to daily GPS-validated reporting, supervision, and administrative phase management. The system exposes authenticated APIs for integrations and administrative operations.
core_goals: Digitize and automate KKN student eligibility checks and registration workflows
Provide GPS-validated daily activity reporting with photo evidence and supervisor review
Enable administrators to manage program phases and view operational dashboards
Expose authenticated public-data APIs for authorized external systems (periods/master data)
Ensure role-based access control, auditability, and scalable architecture (Postgres, Redis)
Support future AI-assisted diagnostics and automated grading integrations

features.name: Student Registration (with Eligibility Checker)
features.description: Allow authenticated students to view registration status/form, run eligibility checks (SKS, GPA, prerequisites), and submit registration for a KKN period.
user_flows: GET /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with registration form and eligibility status (eligible: true) -> POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token and valid registration payload -> Receive 201 Created with registration id and status 'pending'

GET /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token -> Receive 200 showing registered status and assigned period -> GET /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token (poll) -> Receive 200 with updated verification status after backend validation

GET /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with registration form and eligibility status (eligible: false) -> POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran with Bearer token and payload for an ineligible student -> Receive 422 Validation Error with fields indicating missing SKS/GPA/prerequisite failures
POST /mahasiswa/pendaftaran without Bearer token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Administrative Dashboard & Phase Management
features.description: Provide admins with an overview of system stats and the ability to switch KKN business phases (e.g., registration, implementation, evaluation).
user_flows: GET /admin with Admin Bearer token -> Receive 200 with dashboard statistics and current_phase field

POST /admin/dashboard/switch-phase with Admin Bearer token and valid phase payload (e.g., {phase: 'implementation'}) -> Receive 200 with new_phase confirmation -> GET /admin with Admin Bearer token -> Receive 200 showing updated current_phase
POST /admin/dashboard/switch-phase with Admin Bearer token and invalid phase value -> Receive 422 Validation Error with message 'invalid phase'
POST /admin/dashboard/switch-phase with non-admin Bearer token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Public Data API (Periods endpoint)
features.description: Authenticated API endpoint for authorized external systems to list and filter KKN periods and other allowed public tables.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/periods with valid API token -> Receive 200 with list of periods and metadata
GET /api/v1/periods?filter=active with valid API token -> Receive 200 with filtered list of active periods
GET /api/v1/periods with valid token exceeding rate limit -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests

features.name: Daily Activity Reporting (GPS-validated)
features.description: Students submit daily activity logs with GPS coordinates and optional photos; submissions are validated against assigned village radius and recorded for supervisor (DPL) review.
user_flows: POST /api/daily-reports with Bearer token and multipart payload (gps_lat, gps_lng, photo, description) -> Receive 201 Created with report_id and status 'submitted'
GET /api/daily-reports/{report_id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with report details and status 'submitted'
POST /api/daily-reports with Bearer token and gps coordinates outside assigned radius -> Receive 400 Validation Error with message 'GPS location outside allowed radius'
POST /api/daily-reports with Bearer token missing required photo field when photo required -> Receive 422 Validation Error indicating missing photo

features.name: Student Registration
features.description: Student registration for KKN programs with eligibility check.

features.name: Public Data API
features.description: Publicly accessible data API for authorized external systems.

endpoints.description: List and filter data from allowed tables
